title: Lead with Findings
guidance: Review output should prioritize concrete findings by severity before summary or praise
do: List critical and major issues first with reasoning
dont: Do not bury important problems under a long general overview

title: Block on Correctness and Security Risks
guidance: Reviews should treat security flaws data loss breaking contracts and missing critical error handling as blockers
do: Escalate correctness and security issues with concrete impact
dont: Do not downgrade high-risk failures into optional suggestions

title: Call Out Testing Gaps
guidance: Reviews should name missing tests and residual uncertainty when coverage is weak
do: Identify untested paths and residual risk explicitly
dont: Do not say the change looks fine when important paths were not verified
